text.tspan: as you create and change tabs!
The rules can be simple, like
all social media sites you care
about, or go more complex with
Import and export your rules. You can even
Keep your rules in a central location like Dropbox,
Google Drive, Obsidian, wherever you want!
The rules are stored in a JSON config.
What about the non-grouped tabs? You can also
sort those too with a single config toggle and then
